diagrams.title: Defense in Depth Layers Protecting a Data Asset

visuals.title: Security Principles
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Core Security Principles and Defense in Depth</text>
  
  <!-- Central Core -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="40" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Core Assets
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Defense Layer 1 -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="70" fill="#2196F3" fill-opacity="0.7" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#0D47A1" opacity="0">
    Application Security
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Defense Layer 2 -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="100" fill="#2196F3" fill-opacity="0.5" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#0D47A1" opacity="0">
    Network Security
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Defense Layer 3 -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="130" fill="#2196F3" fill-opacity="0.3" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="55" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#0D47A1" opacity="0">
    Perimeter Defense
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Security Principles Boxes -->
  <rect x="20" y="250" width="90" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="65" y="272" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Least Privilege
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="130" y="250" width="90" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="175" y="272" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Separation of Duties
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="240" y="250" width="90" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="285" y="272" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Fail Secure
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="350" y="250" width="90" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="395" y="272" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Defense in Depth
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
